pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh deletion query
setup_openproject.sh project creation logic for 'E-Commerce Platform'
Task description and setup_openproject.sh status seeding
Task description ('Bob Smith') and setup_openproject.sh user creation logic for login 'bob.smith'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a query named 'Bobs Backlog Items' in the 'ecommerce-platform' project (display name 'E-Commerce Platform'). The query must filter for status 'New' and assignee 'bob.smith' (display name 'Bob Smith'). These exact string values and target criteria are confirmed by the task description and the OpenProject environment initialization script (setup_openproject.sh) which deterministically seeds this exact project and user data.
